listening.title: Listening: Grocery numbers
listening.transcript: I have an apple and some bananas. I have some tomatoes, maybe five or six. We need three eggs for the cake.

questions.question: Eggs needed: ___
questions.explanation: "We need three eggs for the cake."

listening.title: Listening: How much do we have?
listening.transcript: I have some rice for dinner, maybe two kilos. There isn't much water in the bottle. I need a little sugar for the cake, just two spoons.

questions.question: How much sugar does the speaker need?
questions.explanation: "I need a little sugar for the cake, just two spoons."
